Other cookies are optional and help personalize your experience, including advertising and analytics. You can consent to all cookies, decline all optional cookies, or manage optional cookies. Without a selection, our default cookie settings will apply. You can change your preferences at any time. To learn more, check out our

Service Hub
Service Hub®
Customer Service Software
Customer service software powered by AI to scale support and drive customer retention.
Get a demo
of HubSpot's service software
Start 14-day free trial
of HubSpot's service tools
Business Solutions
Customer service and retention, powered by AI
Service Hub is AI-powered, omni-channel, and connected to marketing and sales data on a unified customer platform. The result? Easily scalable customer support and proactive customer retention that fuels your business growth.
Scale Support Teams With AI
Scale support without adding headcount. Use intelligent routing and custom views to manage tickets. Track performance with SLAs and real-time analytics to keep customers satisfied.
Help Desk Workspace
Deliver personalized and omni-channel customer support at scale with an AI-powered help desk and ticketing workspace.
Omnichannel Communication
Meet your customers wherever they are by providing personalized support across every channel.
Call Tracking
Create sophisticated call flows with interactive voice response phone trees, enable team routing and transfers, and deliver seamless phone support at scale.
SLA Management
Keep response times low and customers happy with automated ticket routing.
Service Analytics
Uncover key insights with out-of-the-box reports that help you measure team performance and customer satisfaction in real time.
Automated Customer Service
Help your team solve customer issues faster with AI-powered automation that handles routine tasks and support requests.
View more
Drive Retention With Unified Tools
With Service Hub’s connected data, you can identify opportunities to upsell or cross-sell, track customer satisfaction trends, and drive proactive customer retention.
Customer Success Workspace
Manage your book of business, build unique customer health scores, and help your reps prioritize their activities.
Feedback Management
Understand what your customers really think with customizable NPS, CSAT, and customer feedback surveys.
Conversation Intelligence
Learn from every customer interaction with AI-powered call analytics.
Fully Integrated Smart CRM
Give your success team instant access to every support interaction, deal stage, and marketing touchpoint in one connected system.
Smart Deal Progression (Beta)
Identify upsell opportunities and strengthen retention with AI-generated follow-ups from every service interaction.
View more
Scale Support Self-Service with AI
Built-in AI tools make the most of your CRM data to support your customers 24/7.
Knowledge Base
Enable customer self-service and reduce incoming tickets while maintaining 24/7 support availability.
Customer Portal
Empower customers to get the help they need through a secure customer portal.
Breeze Customer Agent
Resolve customer inquiries across email and live chat 24/7 with customizable AI automation.
Breeze Knowledge Base Agent (Beta)
Automatically convert successful support interactions into self- service resources that help customers find answers faster.
Customer Proof
See all case studies
Real Growth, Real Stories
How real customer service teams are using AI tools to scale support and drive retention.
Customer ROI
Download the ROI report
to learn more
57%
increase in ticket close rate after 6 months with Service Hub
72%
of service leaders say HubSpot increased their customer lifetime value

less time closing tickets with Customer Agent

*Discount available for new customers only. Offer has no set end date and can be discontinued at any time. For more detailed information on product packaging and the limits that apply, please see our
pricing page
. Price shown in USD and subject to applicable tax.
Frequently Asked Questions
What is customer service software?
Customer service software is the consolidation point for managing the customer journey. It allows you to manage the onboarding of new customers; collect, organize, and respond to customer support requests; and ensure the growth and satisfaction of your customers.
While most customer service software solutions solve for a specific use case, Service Hub is unique in that it's part of the HubSpot customer platform. With features that make it easy to deliver authentic, personalized service, Service Hub empowers you to prioritize the customer experience.
Can I implement HubSpot’s software without dedicated programmers/developers?
Yes. With automation and contextual guidance built right in, you can get started with Service Hub without involving developers. And if you’re looking for more customization and expertise, our
solutions partners
offer a wide range of specialized support to help you get the most out of your HubSpot implementation.
Will HubSpot help me and my team get started with the software?
Of course! We’ll help all Starter, Professional, and Enterprise users get up and running quickly with a personalized onboarding plan, and our implementation specialists are available to provide guidance on technical setup. Your whole team of free or paid users will also have access to our active community forums, training lessons from HubSpot Academy, and a comprehensive knowledge base of user guides and help documents. For especially complex configurations, businesses also leverage HubSpot’s
expansive ecosystem of over 6,000 partners
for additional support.
What makes HubSpot’s customer service software popular?
While
Service Hub
stands out for the power and ease of use of its support and help desk features, it’s also popular for the way it helps you
manage customer success
. With channels to meet customers where they are and when they need it, Service Hub lets you have contextualized and personalized interactions with

Looks like you've drifted off course.
Vector distance: 0.14023363590240479
That page doesn't exist. But based on where you were headed, this one's worth a look:
TimeLog
TimeLog, led by Lucaas Taxgaard, migrated from Zendesk to HubSpot Enterprise CRM, unifying Marketing Hub Pro, Sales Hub Pro, InfiniGrow, Google Analytics, LinkedIn reporting, CMS Hub, and Enterprise plans. Enhanced by customer journey reports, they improved insights and campaign analysis. Adding Operations Hub streamlined data quality and integrations, especially with Vainu, and Service Hub connected CRM to ticketing, greatly benefiting customer service. These upgrades provided a comprehensive, collaborative platform for optimizing every phase of TimeLog’s process.
Read more

analysis.name: HubSpot Service Hub
analysis.tagline: AI-Powered Customer Service Platform for Growing Teams
analysis.value_proposition: An AI-native help desk and customer service platform built on HubSpot's unified CRM, enabling teams to scale support, automate resolutions, and drive retention without switching tools.
analysis.ideal_customer: Growing B2B/B2C companies already using or considering HubSpot CRM who want support tooling tightly connected to their marketing and sales data

features.name: help desk
features.description: Centralized workspace for managing, triaging, and resolving customer support tickets across channels

features.name: ticketing system
features.description: Create, track, and manage support tickets with custom properties, pipelines, and status tracking

features.name: ticket pipelines
features.description: Customizable multi-stage pipelines for routing and tracking tickets through resolution workflows

features.name: conversation inbox
features.description: Unified inbox aggregating messages from email, chat, Facebook Messenger, WhatsApp, and other channels

features.name: live chat
features.description: Real-time chat widget embeddable on website for direct customer-agent conversations

features.name: chatbot builder
features.description: No-code bot builder for automating chat responses, routing, and qualification flows

features.name: ai customer agent
features.description: Breeze-powered autonomous AI agent that resolves customer queries 24/7 without human intervention

features.name: ai conversation summaries
features.description: Automatically generated summaries of support conversations to reduce rep ramp time

features.name: ai suggested replies
features.description: AI-generated reply suggestions surfaced inline during active conversations

features.name: ai draft assist
features.description: AI-assisted email and message drafting for support agents

features.name: breeze copilot
features.description: Cross-platform AI assistant embedded across Service Hub for agents and admins

features.name: knowledge base
features.description: Self-service help center for publishing and organizing support articles accessible to customers

features.name: customer portal
features.description: Branded self-service portal where customers can view, open, and track their own tickets

features.name: sla management
features.description: Define and enforce service level agreement response and resolution time targets per ticket tier

features.name: csat surveys
features.description: Post-interaction customer satisfaction surveys sent automatically after ticket closure

features.name: nps surveys
features.description: Net Promoter Score surveys for measuring overall customer loyalty and sentiment

features.name: ces surveys
features.description: Customer Effort Score surveys measuring ease of issue resolution

features.name: customer health scoring
features.description: Composite health score based on engagement, support history, and custom signals to identify churn risk

features.name: ticket automation
features.description: Automated ticket routing, assignment, status changes, and follow-ups based on rules and triggers

features.name: workflow automation
features.description: Multi-step automation workflows connecting tickets, contacts, deals, and external apps

features.name: ticket routing
features.description: Rule-based and round-robin routing to assign tickets to the right agent or team automatically

features.name: omnichannel support
features.description: Manage support across email, live chat, phone, WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger from one inbox

features.name: email channel management
features.description: Connect team email inboxes (support@, help@) to route and manage email tickets

features.name: calling
features.description: Built-in VoIP calling to contact customers directly from ticket or contact records

features.name: whatsapp integration
features.description: Native WhatsApp Business channel for receiving and responding to support messages

features.name: facebook messenger integration
features.description: Connect Facebook Messenger to the shared inbox for social support

features.name: service analytics
features.description: Pre-built and custom dashboards for ticket volume, response times, CSAT, and rep performance

features.name: custom reports
features.description: Report builder for creating bespoke analytics across tickets, contacts, and service interactions

features.name: playbooks
features.description: Guided scripts and question cards surfaced to agents during calls and conversations

features.name: goals
features.description: Set and track agent and team performance targets (reply time, ticket closure rate) within HubSpot

features.name: team management
features.description: Create hierarchical teams, assign agents, and control inbox and ticket access by team

features.name: custom roles and permissions
features.description: Granular role-based access control for agents, managers, and admins

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on via SAML for enterprise identity provider integration

features.name: custom objects
features.description: Define custom CRM objects beyond contacts/companies/tickets for domain-specific data modeling

features.name: sandbox environment
features.description: Isolated test environment for safely building and testing workflows before production deployment

features.name: conversation intelligence
features.description: AI analysis of support calls and chats for coaching, trend identification, and QA

features.name: contact timeline
features.description: Full cross-product activity history (marketing, sales, service) on each contact record from shared CRM

features.name: mobile app
features.description: iOS and Android app for managing tickets, conversations, and contacts on the go

features.name: canned snippets
features.description: Reusable text snippets agents can insert into replies to speed up common responses

features.name: email templates
features.description: Saved email reply templates for consistent, repeatable customer communications

features.name: ticket escalation
features.description: Automated escalation rules to reassign or notify when SLAs are breached or tickets are stalled

features.name: hubspot crm integration
features.description: Native bi-directional sync with HubSpot CRM — tickets linked to contacts, companies, and deals

features.name: marketplace integrations
features.description: App marketplace with 1,000+ third-party integrations across categories

features.name: api access
features.description: REST APIs and webhooks for custom integrations and data sync with external systems

features.name: gdpr compliance tools
features.description: Data privacy controls including consent tracking, data deletion requests, and cookie consent

differentiators: Built on a unified CRM — support agents see full marketing and sales history on every contact without switching tools
Breeze AI customer agent resolves queries 24/7 autonomously
Single platform for marketing, sales, and service eliminates data silos
After one year, customers see 37% improvement in ticket closure rates (claimed)
Agentic AI platform framing — entire product suite built around AI agents, not just AI features
Free tier available with no time limit, lowering adoption barrier

recent_ships.what: Breeze AI customer agent — autonomous 24/7 support resolution without human agents
recent_ships.source: landing page hero and solutions nav

recent_ships.what: Breeze Copilot — cross-platform AI assistant embedded across Service Hub for agents
AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) beta — tools to track and improve brand visibility in AI results
Help desk workspace redesign with AI-assisted triage and omnichannel view

praised: All-in-one platform means support agents can see full CRM context without switching tools
Easy to set up and onboard — 'we were up and running in a day'
Free tier is genuinely functional for small teams
Knowledge base and customer portal reduce inbound ticket volume meaningfully
Native integration between Service, Marketing, and Sales Hubs is a real differentiator
Reporting dashboards are good enough for most SMB needs out of the box
complaints: Gets expensive fast — Professional and Enterprise tiers are steep per-seat
Reporting is limited compared to Zendesk Explore or Salesforce; custom reports require workarounds
AI features (Breeze) still feel early — suggested replies can be generic
Knowledge base editor is basic; lacks advanced formatting and versioning
Limited customization vs. dedicated platforms like Zendesk for complex enterprise routing
Can feel slow on large ticket volumes; performance complaints at scale
'HubSpot nickel-and-dimes you — features you expect are locked behind the next tier'

pricing_signal.free_tier: Basic ticketing, shared inbox, live chat, team email, contact management, limited reporting, HubSpot CRM access — no time limit
